channel.title: Fascinating Frontiers — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Fascinating Frontiers podcast episodes. Daily space and astronomy news digest.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Giant craters on metallic asteroid Psyche could finally confirm if it's the exposed core of a destroyed protoplanet.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Researchers are investigating how Mars gravity will change astronauts' skeletal muscle.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: ESA will charter its own dedicated SpaceX Crew Dragon flight to the ISS to expand astronaut flight opportunities.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: The vernal equinox arrives today at 10:46 A.M. EDT, marking astronomical spring as the Sun crosses directly over Earth’s equator.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Blue Origin has filed plans for a massive constellation of up to 51,600 satellites to host data centers in orbit.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA confirms readiness for Artemis 2, targeting a crewed lunar orbit no earlier than April 1.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Scientists traced the most energetic neutrino ever detected to blazars powered by supermassive black holes.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA's DART mission successfully altered an asteroid's solar orbit, proving deflection potential for planetary defense.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: A new study proposes space weather scrambles alien radio signals, evading SETI detectors.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: China's new economic plan elevates space as a pillar industry with deep space goals.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: A total lunar eclipse tonight will turn the full moon blood red, visible to over 3 billion people.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA has overhauled its Artemis program, canceling the Artemis 3 moon landing and adding a preparatory mission in 2027.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA shakes up human spaceflight leadership after critical Starliner report.
